description: Composition Black sleeveless pullover made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck, ribbed neck, armholes and hem, white stripes above the hem, and appliqued branding on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Enjoy the winter in comfort and style in this pullover from fila. The soft knit fabric traps body heat and keeps you warm and comfortable. Layer this pullover over t-shirts, jeans and sneakers. Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
